title: com.para.community.getGovernance
summary: Community governance query for moderators, officials, deputies, metadata, history, and computed summary state.
relationships: Returns community governance views defined in com.para.community.defs.
constraints: `limit` caps candidate members considered for role assignment.
lifecycle: Read when a community profile needs governance roster and role hierarchy overlays.
writers: Read-only query over computed governance state.
indexing: Computes roster, counters, history, and summary views into one payload.
moderation: Governance state determines who is legible as moderator, official, or deputy inside a community.

fields.name: community
fields.description: Community label or identifier used to resolve governance state.

fields.name: moderators / officials / deputies
fields.description: Role-specific governance rosters returned as structured views.

fields.name: summary / counters / editHistory
fields.description: Computed governance metadata and historical context for the community.
